mapper.select: SELECT id, name, account, password, phone, role, status, note, create_time FROM employee WHERE account = #{account}
SELECT id, name, account, password, phone, role, status, note, create_time FROM employee WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (name, account, password, phone, role, status, note) VALUES (#{name}, #{account}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{status}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
